headline: Transcript: We take some questions
summary: Katie Martin speaks to Robert Armstrong
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Unhedged podcast episode: ‘We take some questions’

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Katie MartinOver here at the Unhedged podcast, we love getting questions from our listeners, questions like, why does Rob Armstrong look like Edi Rama, the prime minister of Albania, rather than Cary Grant? And how do you make your own dishwasher tablets? But as we stumble, bleary-eyed and frankly rather beaten up into the end of 2025, we put out a bat signal asking you lot listening out there for questions about markets and finance that you’d like us to answer on the show.

We had loads, thanks very much. Although hardly any, maybe in fact, none from women. Girls, come on now. Don’t be shy. I’ve made a career out of asking stupid questions and Rob certainly has. It’s fine. Anyway, today on the show we are gonna answer as many questions as we can. Sorry, we can’t get to them all, and we’re gonna try not to mess it up.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

This is Unhedged, the markets and finance podcas
